title: Obscurium Walkthrough
description:
Sugar Bytes Obscurium. Released 14th of July 2015.

http://www.sugar-bytes.de/content/products/Obscurium/index.php?lang=en

0:35 General Overview
2:37 The Motion Lane Sequencer – Basics
3:47 Handling the Flexible Parameters
4:24 Pitch & Chord Basics
5:31 Draw Tools
6:32 The Pitch Tab: Scales and Chords Settings
7:30 Polyphony Settings
8:01 The Arpeggiator
8:52 Modulation Basics
10:06 The Filter Section
10:45 The MODS Parameter - modulating the modulators
12:12 The Amp Envelopes
13:19 A Quick Groove in Obscurium
15:05 The Sound Tab (Oscillators)
16:13 Analogue and FM Parameters
18:02 Creating Percussive Loops (Sound Design Basics)
18:58 The Pitch Tab
19:40 The Shift Fader - Intro
20:18 The Morph Fader (State A/B)
21:17 Modulating Shift and Morph
23:32 The Clock Tab
24:50 The Modifiers
25:10 Super Obscure Mode

Advanced Videos:

Obscurium Clock
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tA8DgtkAEK8

Tools and Modifiers
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f0K7449_8eM

Morphing and Shifting
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M3VOIyPLuGY

Plugins
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pLK809abjZE

Thanks to the great Tom Cosm!
http://www.cosm.co.nz
https://www.facebook.com/tomcosmnz?fref=ts
transcript: [Music] hello everybody and welcome to obscurium my name is Tom km and I'm going to be spending the next 20 minutes or so getting you familiar with the features of this very bizarre and alien-like machine it's very very cool uh we're going to start with a general overview and then I'll load a default patch and we'll build something we'll actually make something and I'll explain the new features as we come across them there will be four more videos after this one as well and they'll be covering the more advanced topics so let's get started first thing you'll probably notice is this middle area here we've got some colored dots and there's some movement this is called the motion sequencer it's a 32 step sequencer and we have 16 flexible parameters down the side here that we can control over this motion sequencer now these parameters are mostly to do with things to do with the sound such as the oscillators and we've got a filter section here but there are some interesting pitch parameters here which are things like the uh pitch offset or the polyon for example we've got six tabs up the top uh the clock tab does things to do with the direction and the uh Rhythm and that kind of stuff the pitch tab changes things to do with the scales and the chords which are the most important things and we've got some octave control and stuff as well um the amp envelope we have a couple of different envelopes which I'll get into soon the mods allow us to modify the flexible parameters in different ways the the sound we have our oscillator controls so the sound generation and we have the effect stuff and the general tab is just your general stuff down the bottom we kind of have three areas here we have the draw tools which allow us to draw into the motion sequencer in different ways the modifiers is an interesting area we can isolate steps and Swap all of values around and do strange stuff and the super obscure is kind of a random generator um we'll get into the modifiers and the super obscure in the later videos in more depth there's a virtual keyboard down the bottom here I'm just using my computer keyboard at the moment so you can use your computer
